title: GovernanceRequestedPayload
description: A governance command, not a fact — asks government-service to act inside the election state machine and may be rejected. Exactly one executor (government-service.command-executor) validates it against the state machine + natural keys and emits exactly one outcome: CandidateNominated / VoteCast on success, GovernanceRejected otherwise (08-m2-plan ruling 3, the World invariant ported). The LLM's governanceAction is validated against the per-action params shapes in $defs before a command is ever published (M1-3 seam discipline). Producer: agent-service on commands.government, key = the acting villagerId (per-villager civic ordering). No timeoutMs/priority: the governance plane has no watchdog — the election clock and the consumer's freshness guard (STALE_COMMAND) bound liveness.

commandId.description: Equal to the command's envelope eventId; carried into the outcome event and the executor's processed-commands dedupe.

villagerId.description: The acting villager (the would-be candidate or voter).

action.description: P2 mayoralty verbs. Laws (M3) and factions (M4) are deliberately absent.

params.description: Action-specific parameters; canonical shapes in $defs (declare_candidacy: DeclareCandidacyParams, vote: VoteParams).

platform.description: The campaign promise, in the villager's own words — episode gold.

candidateVillagerId.description: The VILLAGER being voted for — deliberation only ever knows villager ids; the executor resolves it to the candidates row (NOT_A_CANDIDATE if absent).

reason.description: Why — the LLM rationale, rendered on the dashboard's vote-reasons feed.
